title: Everbuild Mammoth Aluminium Tape | Heat and Light Reflective Aluminium Foil Tape for Protecting Wires and Pipes - Silver - 50mm x 45m (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Heat and Light reflective Aluminium Foil Tape, heat resistant to 180°C, Flame Retardant to Class O. Can be used to seal the edges of insulated glass units.
Strong Adhesive: Provides a strong bond as a vapour barrier and in areas exposed to high temperatures.
Excellent Moisture Resistance: Works in environments with high areas of vapour, providing a vapour barrier between foil-faced insulation panels in roof and wall application
Duct sealing on all types of air conditioning and ventilation. Protecting wires and pipes from heat.
Ensure surfaces to which tape is to be applied are clean and dry. Do not use on surfaces that bleed oils or plasticiser. Available Sizes: 50mm x 45m; 75mm x 45m; 100mm x 45m.
description: From the manufacturer Mammoth Aluminium Tape Everbuild Mammoth Aluminium Tape is the first choice, easy to use aluminium foil tape that’s trusted and used by professional. It provides excellent heat resistant properties resilient to up to 180°C holding a flame retardant classification of Class 0 making it suitable for protecting wires and pipes from areas of high temperature and heat. In addition, it’s excellent moisture resistant properties provide a suitable vapour barrier solution for air conditioning and ventilation units, insulation panels in roofs and much more. Discover the Benefits Excellent Moisture Resistance Heat Resistant up to 180°C Strong adhesive hold Protects wires and pipes from heat Works on all air conditioning and ventilation units. Light reflective Provides a vapour barrier between foil-faced insulation Can be used with insulated glass units Strong Hold Excellent strong hold sealing to most common substrates. Heat Resistant Resistant to heat up to 180°C holding a flame retardant classification of Class 0 making it suitable for protecting wires and pipes from areas of high temperature. Moisture Resistant Has excellent moisture resistant properties making it suitable for use in areas such as duct sealing air conditioning and ventilation units. Trusted by Professionals Mammoth Aluminium Tape is the go-to foil tape that is used and trusted by professionals in the trade. Mammoth Powerful Grip Tape Mammoth Mega All Purpose Tape Mammoth Heavy Duty Double Sided Tape Mammoth SOS Pipe Repair Tape Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 3,911 4.3 out of 5 stars 305 4.1 out of 5 stars 439 3.6 out of 5 stars 230 Price — no data — no data £5.00 £ 5 . 00 — no data Purpose Double sided tape with an incredible bond strength that bonds to virtually anything inside and outside. Tough and durable tape with an aggressive natural rubber adhesive for multi-purpose duct sealing uses. Heavy duty, double sided tape with a strong, thick cloth membrane and aggressive rubber resin adhesive for maximum strength. Waterproof tape specifically designed to form an immediate waterproof bandage for leaking water and liquid pipes. About Everbuild Everbuild – A Sika Company are the UK and Ireland’s largest manufacturer of sealants, adhesives, DIY products, powders and building chemicals. Everbuild are proud to be home to the trade’s most respected products which have been enhanced over the years by class-leading research and facilities. With unique technology including i-Cure and Active Resin Technology, Everbuild’s product development activity is relentlessly setting industry standards at the highest quality and leading the field in solving the problems of the future, today.
